query: INSERT INTO tenant_theme (tenant_id, brand_name, favicon_storage_key, favicon_content_type, favicon_bytes_size) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5) ON CONFLICT (tenant_id) DO UPDATE SET favicon_storage_key  = EXCLUDED.favicon_storage_key, favicon_content_type = EXCLUDED.favicon_content_type, favicon_bytes_size   = EXCLUDED.favicon_bytes_size
